name: Reel Cuisine
recipeIngredient: Asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
Corn on the Cob, cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
Marinate the first seven vegetables in olive oil with salt and pepper to taste. Place each vegetable on a skewer and grill until cooked.
Marinate the lobster and shrimp in the lobster marinade.
Toss all grilled items in watermelon salsa (recipe follows) and serve on plates.
Watermelon Salsa:
Lime, cut into 1/4-inch pieces
Cucumbers, peeled and seedless, diced into 1/2-inch pieces
Watermelon, seeded and diced into 1/2-inch pieces
Green Onions, thinly sliced
Cilantro, minced
Jalapeno Chile, seeded and minced
Sugar
Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
